title: delphinium scopulorum var. attenuatum
intro: Delphinium scopulorum var. attenuatum, also known as a variety of Rocky Mountain delphinium, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain delphinine, a compound with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Delphinium scopulorum var. attenuatum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Delphinium scopulorum var. attenuatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
